steps.label: fe_indexed_history
steps.stdout_tail:
========================================================================
AXIS 0 Fe-INDEXED Xi_hist PROBE
========================================================================
Comparing Fe-indexed bridge constructions against Phase 4 winner.

  A = Phase 4 winner (baseline): full trajectory, exp weighting
  B = Fe-indexed 7-step window: 8 windows at Fe steps, MI-weighted
  C = Fe pairs only: Ti→Fe adjacent pairs, MI-weighted
  D = lag=7 pairs: compression horizon lag, no Fe indexing

  1/inner: A=1.7813 B=1.4972 C=1.7360 D=1.4699 | winner=A_phase4_winner gain=+0.0000
  1/clifford: A=1.2457 B=0.8104 C=1.0351 D=1.0459 | winner=A_phase4_winner gain=+0.0000
  1/outer: A=1.7811 B=1.4972 C=1.7360 D=1.4597 | winner=A_phase4_winner gain=+0.0000
  2/inner: A=1.7106 B=1.6170 C=1.7064 D=1.4373 | winner=A_phase4_winner gain=+0.0000
  2/clifford: A=0.9691 B=0.8686 C=0.9174 D=0.9657 | winner=A_phase4_winner gain=+0.0000
  2/outer: A=1.7165 B=1.6170 C=1.7064 D=1.4380 | winner=A_phase4_winner gain=+0.0000

========================================================================
OVERALL RESULTS
========================================================================
  Fe-step MI advantage over non-Fe: +0.1541

  Bridge                mean MI  mean Ic  gain vs A  wins
  -------------------------------------------------------
  A Phase4 baseline      1.5340   0.5429          —     6/6
  B Fe-indexed 7-win     1.3179   0.3386    -0.2161     0/6
  C Fe pairs only        1.4729   0.4896    -0.0612     0/6
  D lag=7 pairs          1.3028   0.3208    -0.2313     0/6

  ✗ KILL — Phase 4 winner holds; Fe indexing adds no MI gain
    The full-trajectory exponential weighting is already optimal.

  FEP framing:
    Fe steps = 2/32 = 25% of trajectory
    Fe MI mean: 1.6583
    Non-Fe MI: 1.5042
    Interpretation: Fe is prediction INSTANTIATION, not sensory correction.
    Phase5A certified marginal-preserving MI ≈ 0 → prediction dominates.
    The entire 4-step cycle is the prior unfolding; Fe is its peak.

================================================================================
